title: The Hello Shack Mod!
description: Adds the hello shack! seen in the minecraft live streams of the popular youtuber tnn1nja
body:
Note: The Hello Shack mod currently only supports Forge because I cannot get the mod to compile in Fabric.

 

Have you watched the YouTuber tnn1nja's first Minecraft live stream and have been wanting your very own Hello Shack to spawn in your world? Well, now with the Hello Shack mod, this dream of yours can come true! All you have to do is download the mod, make a new world, locate a sparse jungle, and then you should be able to find multiple versions of the Hello Shack all around you!

aka this mod adds in new structures called "hello shacks" that spawn in the sparse jungle biome

More hello shacks are on the way!

But what is a hello shack?
for those that don't know a hello shack is a shack that spawns in sparse jungle biomes they were created by me, this mod is a reference to a stream made by the YouTuber tnn1nja in which I created a shack called the hello shack a small shack that has some signs that say hey and hi and may contain some items useful early game.

CurseForge:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hello-shack-mod
